# Curator

Curator is an AI assistant for FIRST Robotics Competition (FRC) teams.

It helps users find accurate, cited information from:
- Official FIRST game manuals and team updates
- Team reference documents
- Live FRC data (teams, events, matches, rankings)

## Primary audience

- FRC students
- Mentors
- Drive teams and scouting teams

## Core capabilities

- Answers questions about FRC rules and gameplay
- Summarizes and explains official documentation
- Retrieves live competition context from The Blue Alliance
- Supports authenticated chat history and optional public chat sharing

## Important limitations

- Responses may be incorrect or outdated
- Users should verify competition-critical guidance against official FIRST sources

## Public URLs

- Home: https://curator.team1676.org/
- Privacy Policy: https://curator.team1676.org/privacy-policy
- Terms of Service: https://curator.team1676.org/terms-of-service

## Operator

Curator is operated by Team 1676 (Pascack Pi-oneers) as a community tool.
